case_title: MARSHALL M. SAMUELS VS. FRIENDLY WHOLESALERS OF CALIFORNIA DBA SEE MO CARS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMUELS, MARSHALL M. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO FRIENDLY WHOLESALERS OF CALIFORNIA DBA SEE MO CARS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-18-2016 AT 8:30 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRIENDLY WHOLESALERS DBA SEE MO CARS WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY AZZAM ABDO. DEFENDANT SEE MO CARS WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MOHAMED SHREIM. PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD SEE MO CARS AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT WHICH WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS ANT NOTICE OF COMPLAINT. PLATINFIF'S CLAIM AGAINST FRIENDLY WHOLESALERS OF CALFIORNIA DBA SEE MO CARS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,893.00 FILED BY SAMUELS, MARSHALL M. AS TO DEFENDANT FRIENDLY WHOLESALERS OF CALIFORNIA DBA SEE MO CARS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIENDLY WHOLESALERS OF CALIFORNIA DBA SEE MO CARS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMUELS, MARSHALL M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEE MO CARS PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD SEE MO CARS AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT WHICH WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE OF THE COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST FRIENDLY WHOLESALERS OF CALFORNIA DBA SEE MO CARS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED FEB-09-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FRIENDLY WHOLESALERS OF CALIFORNIA DBA SEE MO CARS
